name: github
description: Generated TGG ruleset: github CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.name: R_github_concurrency_user_comment
rules.documentation: github: user `# foo` comment under concurrency <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.documentation: github: user `# foo` comment under deployment <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_github_concept_trigger_branch_match
rules.documentation: github: concept `trigger_branch_match` via path `on.push.branches` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]

rules.name: R_github_concept_trigger_tag_match
rules.documentation: github: concept `trigger_tag_match` via path `on.push.tags` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]

rules.name: R_github_concept_trigger_path_match
rules.documentation: github: concept `trigger_path_match` via path `on.push.paths` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=paths]

rules.name: R_github_concept_trigger_cron
rules.documentation: github: concept `trigger_cron` via path `on.schedule[].cron` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=schedule]
